business_context.industry_terms: 自行车制造、零售销售、B2B客户、生产制造、供应链管理、库存管理、客户关系、销售区域、员工绩效、产品线管理
business_context.business_rules: 关注自行车及配件的销售趋势，分析产品线（山地车、公路车、旅行车）表现，监控库存周转率，评估销售区域业绩，跟踪生产工单状态，管理供应商关系，分析客户购买行为
business_context.data_characteristics: 包含产品(product)、产品类别(productcategory/productsubcategory)、客户(customer)、销售订单(salesorderheader/salesorderdetail)、销售人员(salesperson)、销售区域(salesterritory)、员工(employee)、部门(department)、供应商(vendor)、采购订单(purchaseorderheader/purchaseorderdetail)、库存(productinventory)、生产工单(workorder)等核心业务数据，支持完整的制造-销售-服务业务链分析
business_context.analysis_focus: 产品销售分析、客户价值分析、销售区域分析、员工绩效分析、库存周转分析、生产效率分析、供应商管理分析

example_queries.query: 查看销售额最高的产品
example_queries.sql_pattern: SELECT p.Name AS ProductName, SUM(od.LineTotal) AS TotalSales FROM product p JOIN salesorderdetail od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID GROUP BY p.ProductID, p.Name ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 10
example_queries.description: 分析产品销售排名，识别畅销产品

example_queries.query: 各产品类别的销售情况
example_queries.sql_pattern: SELECT pc.Name AS Category, ps.Name AS SubCategory, SUM(od.LineTotal) AS TotalSales FROM productcategory pc JOIN productsubcategory ps ON pc.ProductCategoryID = ps.ProductCategoryID JOIN product p ON ps.ProductSubcategoryID = p.ProductSubcategoryID JOIN salesorderdetail od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID GROUP BY pc.ProductCategoryID, pc.Name, ps.ProductSubcategoryID, ps.Name ORDER BY TotalSales DESC
example_queries.description: 按产品类别和子类别分析销售额

example_queries.sql_pattern: SELECT c.CustomerID, st.Name AS StoreName, SUM(o.TotalDue) AS TotalAmount FROM customer c LEFT JOIN store st ON c.StoreID = st.BusinessEntityID JOIN salesorderheader o ON c.CustomerID = o.CustomerID GROUP BY c.CustomerID, st.Name ORDER BY TotalAmount DESC LIMIT 10
example_queries.description: 分析高价值客户，了解主要客户来源

example_queries.sql_pattern: SELECT t.Name AS Territory, t.CountryRegionCode, SUM(o.TotalDue) AS TotalSales, COUNT(o.SalesOrderID) AS OrderCount FROM salesterritory t JOIN salesorderheader o ON t.TerritoryID = o.TerritoryID GROUP BY t.TerritoryID, t.Name, t.CountryRegionCode ORDER BY TotalSales DESC
example_queries.description: 分析各销售区域的业绩表现

example_queries.query: 库存不足需要补货的产品
example_queries.sql_pattern: SELECT p.Name AS ProductName, pi.Quantity AS CurrentStock, p.ReorderPoint, p.SafetyStockLevel FROM product p JOIN productinventory pi ON p.ProductID = pi.ProductID WHERE pi.Quantity < p.ReorderPoint ORDER BY (p.ReorderPoint - pi.Quantity) DESC
example_queries.description: 识别库存低于再订购点的产品

example_queries.sql_pattern: SELECT v.Name AS VendorName, COUNT(po.PurchaseOrderID) AS OrderCount, SUM(po.TotalDue) AS TotalAmount FROM vendor v JOIN purchaseorderheader po ON v.VendorID = po.VendorID GROUP BY v.VendorID, v.Name ORDER BY TotalAmount DESC LIMIT 10
example_queries.description: 分析各供应商的采购量和采购金额

example_queries.query: 对比各年度销售额变化
example_queries.sql_pattern: WITH YearlySales AS (SELECT YEAR(OrderDate) AS SalesYear, SUM(TotalDue) AS TotalSales FROM salesorderheader GROUP BY YEAR(OrderDate)) SELECT y1.SalesYear, y1.TotalSales, y2.TotalSales AS PreviousYearSales, ROUND((y1.TotalSales - COALESCE(y2.TotalSales, 0)) / NULLIF(y2.TotalSales, 0) * 100, 2) AS GrowthRate FROM YearlySales y1 LEFT JOIN YearlySales y2 ON y1.SalesYear = y2.SalesYear + 1 ORDER BY y1.SalesYear
example_queries.description: 使用 CTE 对比各年度销售额，计算同比增长率

example_queries.sql_pattern: WITH CustomerMetrics AS (SELECT c.CustomerID, COUNT(o.SalesOrderID) AS OrderCount, SUM(o.TotalDue) AS TotalSpend, MAX(o.OrderDate) AS LastOrderDate FROM customer c JOIN salesorderheader o ON c.CustomerID = o.CustomerID GROUP BY c.CustomerID) SELECT CustomerID, OrderCount, TotalSpend, LastOrderDate, CASE WHEN TotalSpend > 10000 THEN 'VIP' WHEN TotalSpend > 5000 THEN 'Regular' ELSE 'Occasional' END AS CustomerTier FROM CustomerMetrics ORDER BY TotalSpend DESC
example_queries.description: 使用 CTE 进行客户价值分层，支持 RFM 分析

example_queries.sql_pattern: WITH MonthlySales AS (SELECT p.ProductID, p.Name AS ProductName, DATE_FORMAT(o.OrderDate, '%Y-%m') AS SalesMonth, SUM(od.LineTotal) AS MonthlyTotal FROM product p JOIN salesorderdetail od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID JOIN salesorderheader o ON od.SalesOrderID = o.SalesOrderID GROUP BY p.ProductID, p.Name, DATE_FORMAT(o.OrderDate, '%Y-%m')) SELECT ProductID, ProductName, SalesMonth, MonthlyTotal FROM MonthlySales ORDER BY ProductID, SalesMonth
example_queries.description: 使用 CTE 分析产品月度销售趋势

example_queries.query: 计算各产品类别销售额占总销售额的百分比
example_queries.sql_pattern: SELECT pc.Name AS Category, SUM(od.LineTotal) AS CategorySales, SUM(od.LineTotal) / (SELECT SUM(LineTotal) FROM salesorderdetail) * 100 AS Percentage FROM productcategory pc JOIN productsubcategory ps ON pc.ProductCategoryID = ps.ProductCategoryID JOIN product p ON ps.ProductSubcategoryID = p.ProductSubcategoryID JOIN salesorderdetail od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID GROUP BY pc.ProductCategoryID, pc.Name ORDER BY Percentage DESC
example_queries.description: 使用子查询计算总额，外层相除得到各类别占比

example_queries.query: 查询每个类别中价格最高的产品
example_queries.sql_pattern: SELECT pc.Name AS Category, p.Name AS Product, p.ListPrice FROM productcategory pc JOIN productsubcategory ps ON pc.ProductCategoryID = ps.ProductCategoryID JOIN product p ON ps.ProductSubcategoryID = p.ProductSubcategoryID WHERE p.ListPrice = (SELECT MAX(p2.ListPrice) FROM product p2 JOIN productsubcategory ps2 ON p2.ProductSubcategoryID = ps2.ProductSubcategoryID WHERE ps2.ProductCategoryID = ps.ProductCategoryID)
example_queries.description: 使用相关子查询查找每个分组中的最大值记录

订单金额.explanation: 订单的总金额，包含商品价格、税费和运费等

产品类别.explanation: 产品的分类体系，AdventureWorks 有自行车、组件、服装、配件四大类

库存管理.explanation: 跟踪产品库存水平，包括当前库存、安全库存和再订购点等指标

销售区域.explanation: 按地理位置划分的销售区域，用于分析区域销售业绩

产品成本与定价.explanation: 产品的制造成本和销售价格，用于利润分析

销售订单.explanation: 客户订单信息，包含订单头信息和订单明细

采购订单.explanation: 向供应商的采购订单，包含采购头信息和采购明细

供应商管理.explanation: 供应商信息及其供货关系

客户管理.explanation: 客户信息，包括个人客户和企业客户

生产工单.explanation: 生产制造的工单信息，跟踪制造进度和完成情况

员工部门.explanation: 员工和部门组织架构信息

占比计算.explanation: 计算某部分占总体的百分比。使用子查询 SUM(col) / (SELECT SUM(col) FROM table) * 100 获取总额，外层相除得到占比。子查询要与外层使用相同的基表
占比计算.sql_pattern: SUM(column) / (SELECT SUM(column) FROM table) * 100 AS Percentage

分组内极值.explanation: 查找每个分组中某列取最大或最小值的记录。使用相关子查询 WHERE col = (SELECT MAX/MIN(col) FROM table WHERE 关联条件) 或窗口函数 ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ...) = 1
分组内极值.sql_pattern: WHERE column = (SELECT MAX(column) FROM table t2 WHERE t2.group_col = t1.group_col)

产品层级结构.explanation: AdventureWorks 产品分类是三层结构：ProductCategory (大类，如 Bikes/Components/Clothing/Accessories) → ProductSubcategory (子类) → Product (产品)。查询产品类别信息必须按此层级 JOIN
产品层级结构.join_pattern: productcategory pc JOIN productsubcategory ps ON pc.ProductCategoryID = ps.ProductCategoryID JOIN product p ON ps.ProductSubcategoryID = p.ProductSubcategoryID

表连接语义选择.explanation: 当问题要求'有记录的'、'实际发生的'、'存在关联的'数据时，使用 INNER JOIN 过滤无关联记录。当问题要求'所有的'、'包含空值'、'即使没有也显示'时，使用 LEFT JOIN 保留无关联记录
表连接语义选择.sql_pattern: INNER JOIN 过滤无关联 | LEFT JOIN 保留全部

TOP N 查询模式.explanation: 当问题包含'前N名'、'排名前N'、'最高的N个'时，需要使用 ORDER BY 排序后加 LIMIT N。注意先排序再限制
TOP N 查询模式.sql_pattern: ORDER BY column DESC LIMIT N

HAVING 过滤条件.explanation: 当问题要求'超过N次的'、'大于N个的'等对聚合结果的过滤时，使用 HAVING 子句而非 WHERE。HAVING 在 GROUP BY 之后执行

日期分组格式.explanation: 按年月分组时，如需分开显示使用 YEAR(date) 和 MONTH(date) 作为两列；如需合并使用 DATE_FORMAT(date, '%Y-%m')。根据问题要求选择

销售金额字段.explanation: AdventureWorks 中销售订单总额使用 TotalDue 字段(含税费)，SubTotal 不含税费和运费。统计销售额应使用 TotalDue

隐式关联过滤.explanation: 当问题暗示必须存在关联记录时(如'有产品的类别'、'购买过X的客户')，应使用 INNER JOIN 而非 LEFT JOIN，自动过滤无关联的记录
